news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因是新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume from new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_zh: Cardano 公布 Plutus V4升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade will enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链，扩展跨链兼容性。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its cross-chain compatibility.

news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Dev Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin 基金会研究小组发布草案，提议基于 ZK-Rollup 的 Layer2 方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce fees for micro-transactions.
